company.name: Aurobindo Pharma Ltd.
company.subtitle: Indian top-3 US generics player by Rx volume. FY25 (Mar25) revenue INR 317B / ~$3.78B. US 47% (~$1.78B), Europe 25% (~$0.95B fastest growth), Growth Markets 6%, ARV 4% (declining), API 13%. Eugia (specialty + biosimilars subsidiary): Avastin/Herceptin/Filgrastim/Pegfilgrastim biosimilars. Pen-G facility (Kakinada) commercial FY25 ramping. AuroVaccines PCV-13 early launch.

assets.name: Aurobindo US generics franchise (top-3 by Rx volume)
Aurobindo Europe generics franchise (CuraTeq commercialization)
assets.stage: Commercial (FY25 ~$790M EU; fastest growing geo ex-Eugia biosims)

assets.name: Aurobindo Growth Markets + ARV franchise
assets.stage: Commercial (FY25 ~$310M Growth + ARV declining on tender pricing)

assets.name: Aurobindo API + Pen-G franchise
assets.stage: Commercial (FY25 ~$490M API; Pen-G Kakinada commercial FY25)
